<!-- PR template for Phase P2 feature branches -->
## Summary

Describe the change and the overall motivation. Link to GitHub issue(s) where applicable.

## Changes
- What changed
- Why it is needed

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure / DevOps
- [ ] Security-related

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch: `feature/<short>-<ticket>` or `fix/<short>-<ticket>`
- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] CI passes (see .github/workflows/p2-ci.yml)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Issue linked and assignees added

## Governance Checklist
- [ ] Follows code style/conventions in `/docs` or `.instructions.md`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Appropriate error handling & logging added
- [ ] For infrastructure changes: ADR or justification provided
- [ ] For security changes: security review completed (if applicable)

## Related Issues
Closes #

## Deployment Notes
- Any migration or rollout steps
- Reversibility plan (if applicable)

---
_Use this template for feature branches targeting Phase P2._
_Review docs/AI_AGENT_SAFETY_FRAMEWORK.md for autonomous action safety policies._
